description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that runs on push to master and array_algebra branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow should have three ubuntu-18.04 jobs: build-test-cpu, build-test-cpu-release, and build-test-cpu-openmp-python-asserts. Each job checks out the code, creates a build directory, runs cmake, make, and make test with specific configurations and environment variables.
